page_content:
Restriction: Must be in Special Education program.

Credit Only Granted for. EDSP487 or EDSP687.

EDSP488 Selected Topics in Teacher Education (1-3 Credits) Restriction: Permission of EDUC-Counseling, Higher Education and Special Education department; or must be in a major in EDUC-College of Education.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
